problem: What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost?
mechanism: Metal-organic framework with specific pore geometry
hypothesis: If Metal-organic framework with specific pore geometry is applied to low, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Prototype device testing with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
